title: Parametric CAD Bench submission manifest
description: Pointer from this GitHub repo to a contributor's run artifacts on Hugging Face, plus self-declared summary metrics that maintainers re-derive during manual review.

schema_version.description: Manifest schema version. Bump only via PR to manifest.schema.json.

version.description: Increment when re-submitting the same (handle, agent, model) tuple after fixing issues.

submitted_at.description: ISO 8601 date (YYYY-MM-DD) the manifest was filed.

email.description: Optional contact email for verification follow-up.

tag.description: Currently only v1 accepted. Future versions extend this enum.

name.description: Short slug for the agent (e.g. codex, claude-code, mini-swe-agent).

version.description: Exact version string. For closed-source agents, a build identifier is fine.

import_path.description: Optional Python import path for custom Harbor adapters (informational).

id.description: Exact LiteLLM-style model id used (e.g. openai/gpt-5.5, vertex_ai/gemini-3.1-pro).

endpoint.description: Optional endpoint URL if non-default. Maintainers use this to verify trajectory plausibility.

hf_repo.description: Hugging Face dataset id (owner/name) hosting your runs/ tree.

hf_commit_oid.description: Full 40-char commit hash on the HF dataset. Maintainers verify against this exact oid (no float to main).

runs_prefix.description: Path prefix inside the HF repo, e.g. 'runs/codex/openai-gpt-5_5/'. Trailing slash required.

mean_composite.description: Your claimed mean of the harmonic-mean composite across all trials. Maintainers re-derive from spot-checks and compare.

trials_per_task.description: Number of trials per task_id. Single-trial submissions are allowed but flagged on the leaderboard.

exceptions.description: Trials that crashed / timed out / never produced a reward.json.

cost_usd.description: Optional. Maintainers re-derive from token counts × published pricing; the leaderboard uses the re-derived value.

notes.description: Optional free-form notes — harness tweaks, known limitations, agent quirks.
